message:
fix(polyfills): add std/os exposure and improve module registration

- Add std/os global exposure to native_main_static.zig (matches embed.zig)
- Add comprehensive defer cleanup to break reference cycles and prevent leaks
- Register compression.zig as both 'compression' and 'zlib' for Node.js compat
- Add _modules.net and _modules.tls registration in native polyfills
- Create _modules.fs if not exists instead of returning early
